scripts.build:deploy: bun run clean:public && bun run build:frontend
scripts.deploy: bun run build:deploy && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:dry-run: bun run build:deploy && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.deploy:keep-vars: bun run build:deploy && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --keep-vars
scripts.test: bun run test:worker && bun run test:frontend
